title: dactylorhiza × maculana
intro: Dactylorhiza × maculana is a hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Dactylorhiza fuchsii. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating various health issues. Dactylorhiza × maculana has been traditionally used to help alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and to treat conditions like high blood pressure and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried extract for its herbal remedies, which are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
